title: Changing
lyric:
[01:00.05]I can hear, I can hear, I can hear you.
[01:07.42]Can we close, can we close, can we close this so-called distance?
[01:15.01]How do I know you're near when you sometimes disappear?
[01:21.94]I'm falling apart, I can't sense your heart, and nothing is clear.
[01:28.98]
[01:31.10]So long to the past and the winter air.
[01:34.72]I'm no longer caught in the darkness.
[01:39.27]It has cleared away and now I see you there.
[01:44.93]
[01:45.54]Somewhere out there, the beginning,
[01:52.31]Everything may not make sense at first until we try.
[02:00.67]Give this a chance so that once more
[02:07.30]I can cherish you until the end of time.
[02:13.35]
[02:15.12]I am changing each and every day,
[02:22.46]But remaining is the warmth you gave.
[02:28.85]
[02:30.02]Can you hear, can you hear, can you hear me?
[02:37.43]Let yourself, let yourself, let yourself control the distance.
[02:45.01]Do you feel when I'm near when you sometimes disappear?
[02:51.81]You're falling apart and closing your heart, when I am right here.
[02:57.57]
[03:01.03]So long to the past and the winter air.
[03:04.60]You're no longer caught in the darkness.
[03:09.27]It will clear away and you'll see again.
[03:14.62]
[03:16.01]So long to the past and the winter air.
[03:19.54]I'm no longer caught in the darkness.
[03:24.13]It has cleared away and now I see you there.
[03:29.99]
[03:30.54]Somewhere out there, you are fading.
[03:37.53]Everything may not make sense at first until you try.
[03:45.67]Give it a chance so that once more.
[03:52.34]You'll no longer be alone to hurt this time.
[03:58.52]
[04:00.05]I am changing each and every day,
[04:07.29]But remaining is the warmth you gave.
[04:14.11]
[04:15.01]You are changing each and every day,
[04:22.36]But remaining is the warmth you saved.
[04:28.92]
[04:30.93]So long to the past and the winter air.
[04:34.75]You're no longer caught in the darkness.
[04:39.33]It will clear away and you'll see again.
[04:44.47]
[04:46.10]So long to the past and the winter air.
[04:49.80]I'm no longer caught in the darkness.
[04:54.20]It has cleared away and now I see you there.
[04:59.47]
[05:00.42]Somewhere out there, the beginning,
[05:07.31]Everything may not make sense at first until we try.
[05:15.59]Give this a chance so that once more
[05:22.32]I can cherish you until the end of time.
[05:28.00]
[05:30.07]I am changing each and every day,
[05:37.38]But remaining is the warmth you gave.
[05:43.98]
[05:44.92]You are changing each and every day,
[05:52.38]But remaining is the warmth you saved.
[05:58.98]
sub_lyric:
[by:--FELT翻译小队--]
[01:00.05]我能听见你的声音，这般真切
[01:07.42]我们何不，去跨越彼此间虚无的沟壑
[01:15.01]你不经意间的消失，让我不知所措
[01:21.94]逐渐支离破碎，周身陷入混沌，再无法触及你的内心
[01:31.10]凛冬的空气，连结起过去的回忆
[01:34.72]不再迷失于无尽黑夜
[01:39.27]曙光的前方，便是你的身影
[01:45.54]故事的开端，就在某处
[01:52.31]唯有尝试的勇气才能指引前进的方向
[02:00.67]给予一次机会，这一次我定将
[02:07.30]与心爱的你共行至时间尽头
[02:15.12]光怪陆离，千变万化的日常之中
[02:22.46]亘古不变的唯有你给予的温暖
[02:30.02]你能否听见我的声音，一如往昔
[02:37.43]伸出你的双手，越过彼此间的沟壑
[02:45.01]从我身边不辞而别的你，是否感受到我的存在
[02:51.81]你的内心逐渐支离破碎，纵使我就近在眼前
[03:01.03]凛冬的空气，连结起过去的回忆
[03:04.60]你将不再迷失于无尽黑夜
[03:09.27]曙光的前方，我们将再次相遇
[03:16.01]凛冬的空气，唤醒了过去的回忆
[03:19.54]我已不再迷失于无尽黑夜
[03:24.13]曙光的前方，便有着你的身影
[03:30.54]某处的角落，你的背影渐渐模糊
[03:37.53]唯有尝试的勇气才能指引前进的方向
[03:45.67]给予一次机会，我会攥紧手心
[03:52.34]这一次，你将不再孤身一人承受痛苦
[04:00.05]光怪陆离，千变万化的日常之中
[04:07.29]亘古不变的唯有你给予的温暖
[04:15.01]分别的时光改变了你的模样
[04:22.36]不变的是你捧在手心的温暖
[04:30.93]凛冬的空气，连结起过去的回忆
[04:34.75]你将不再迷失于无尽黑夜
[04:39.33]曙光的前方，我们将再次相遇
[04:46.10]凛冬的空气，连结起过去的回忆
[04:49.80]不再迷失于无尽黑夜
[04:54.20]曙光的前方，便是你的身影
[05:00.42]故事的开端，就在某处
[05:07.31]唯有尝试的勇气才能指引前进的方向
[05:15.59]给予一次机会，这一次我将
[05:22.32]与心爱的你共行至时间尽头
[05:30.07]光怪陆离，千变万化的日常之中
[05:37.38]亘古不变的唯有你给予的温暖
[05:44.92]分别的时光改变了你的模样
[05:52.38]不变的是你捧在手心的温暖
